  </section>

  <section class="block">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-12">

          <div class="features">
            <div class="feature" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="0" data-sal-repeat>
              <div class="feature-img">
                <img src="images/insights.svg" alt="Zoom to data">
              </div>
              <div class="feature-copy">
                <h3>Data. Insights. Wow!</h3>
                <p>Let us visualize your data cost-to-revenue, measurring profitability and behaviourial patterns across
                  more than 20 attribution dimensions.</p>
                <p class="small"><strong>Learn your effective CPM, classify your audience based on behaviour or
                    profitability, micro track your acquisition margin and much more.</strong></p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="feature" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="100" data-sal-repeat>
              <div class="feature-img">
                <img src="images/orchestration.svg" alt="Arrange elements orderly">
              </div>
              <div class="feature-copy">
                <h3>Unified Orchestration</h3>
                <p>Intelligently orchestrate your funnels' data and its optimisation by taking actions across any 3rd
                  party platforms.</p>
                <p class="small"><strong>Use machine learning and smart triggers to immediately take action once an UP
                    or DOWN trend detected.</strong></p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="feature" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="200" data-sal-repeat>
              <div class="feature-img">
                <img src="images/insights.svg" alt="Zoom to data">
              </div>
              <div class="feature-copy">
                <h3>Hook us everywhere</h3>
                <p>SrcFlare can hook and easily mediate any traffic source, servig as and Ad-meditation, Search or RTB
                  bidding, supporting both custom and industry standard protocols.</p>
                <p class="small"><strong>Build new cross-marketing funnels instantly! Oprimize CPA to PPV, RTB to CPA/I,
                    Display to Searcj and much more.</strong></p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="container btn-signup" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="300" data-sal-repeat>
      <button class="btn button btn-primary mt-4 signup">Get Started Now</button>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="whydf-block" id="features">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="row mb-5">
        <div class="col-md-12">
          <h2 class="block-head" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="0" data-sal-repeat>
            Technology
          </h2>
          <p class="block-intro" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="100" data-sal-repeat>
            Like a Giant Octopus combined with a Data Godzilla, our real-time engine collects your data microbytes,
            extends it with business attribution layers to track & learn your performance vs your opportunity -- then,
            it tunes everything needed to capitalize it.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-12">

          <div class="tiles">

            <div class="tile" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="0" data-sal-repeat>
              <img class="tile-img" src="images/dashboard.svg" />
              <h3>Dashboard</h3>
              <p>
                Our intuitive dashboard will let you intelligently orchestrate your campaigns - from viewing the data,
                analyzing insights, build your strategy and take real-actions (increase, decrease, start, stop, do, etc)
              </p>
            </div>

            <div class="tile" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="100" data-sal-repeat>
              <img class="tile-img" src="images/idea.svg" />
              <h3>Don't Miss the Trend!</h3>
              <p>
                Identify in few hours what's working, but more important - what's not! Learn where to invest and also,
                when to stop.
              </p>
            </div>

            <div class="tile" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="200" data-sal-repeat>
              <img class="tile-img" src="images/control.svg" />
              <h3>Full Control & Easy Scale</h3>
              <p>
                Let us babysit your campaigns! create smart dynamic rules to take real-time actions even when you are
                sleeping.
              </p>
            </div>

            <div class="tile" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="300" data-sal-repeat>
              <img class="tile-img" src="images/ai.svg" />
              <h3>AI Powered</h3>
              <p>
                Well although its a common buzz-word, we are really proud in our unique AI technology with its
                predictive capabilities derived by the fractions of the data it gathers.
              </p>
            </div>

            <div class="tile" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="400" data-sal-repeat>
              <img class="tile-img" src="images/target.svg" />
              <h3>Robust Targeting</h3>
              <p>
                Identify in few hours what's working, but more important - what's not! learn where to invest and also,
                when to stop.
              </p>
            </div>

            <div class="tile" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="500" data-sal-repeat>
              <img class="tile-img" src="images/anti-fraud.svg" />
              <h3>Antifraud Actions</h3>
              <p>
                Identify suspisious patterns to protect your traffic or your media campaigns from fraudulent activities
                and non-human bots.
              </p>
            </div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="container btn-signup" data-sal="slide-up" data-sal-duration="600" data-sal-delay="600" data-sal-repeat>
      <button class="btn button btn-primary mt-5 signup">Get Started Now</button>
    </div>
  </section>
